title: arnshop
subtitle: E-Commerce Platform
description: E-commerce platform selling electronic devices. Built with Java featuring a professional GUI and full shopping cart functionality.
longDescription: A complete e-commerce solution for electronic devices. Features product catalog, shopping cart, order management, and an interactive Java GUI. Demonstrates full-stack Java development skills.

title: webscraping
subtitle: Python Data Extraction
description: Scrapes structured data from websites using Python and BeautifulSoup. Handles multi-page extraction efficiently.
longDescription: A Python web scraping project using BeautifulSoup to extract structured data from multiple pages. Ideal for data collection and analysis pipelines.

title: Handwriting Recognition AI
subtitle: CNN Machine Learning Model
description: AI model using convolutional neural networks to identify and classify handwritten text and digits from large datasets.
longDescription: Machine learning project implementing CNN architecture for handwriting recognition. Trained on large datasets to classify handwritten digits and text with high accuracy.

title: mqtt-weather-app
subtitle: IoT Weather Monitoring
description: Weather station monitoring system using MQTT protocol. Python + Flask backend receives sensor data via MQTT subscriptions.
longDescription: IoT weather monitoring application that collects environmental data through MQTT protocol. Built with Python and Flask, processes real-time sensor data from connected weather stations.

title: arnlibrary
subtitle: Library Management System
description: Java library management system with book records, student records, and interactive GUI for managing library operations.
longDescription: Complete Library Management System in Java with GUI. Manages book inventory, student borrowing records, due dates, and administrative operations.

title: BFS-DFS Algorithms
subtitle: Graph Traversal Implementation
description: Implementation of Breadth-First Search and Depth-First Search graph traversal algorithms.
longDescription: Educational project implementing BFS and DFS graph traversal algorithms with visualization and performance analysis.
